prompt: Tiny change: add the antigravity CLI to the owner's dev profile in home/dev.nix. The file already has 'lib.optional config.cosmo.antigravity.enable pkgs.antigravity' — first verify the exact package attribute for the CLI in the pinned nixpkgs (try pkgs.antigravity-cli via nix eval/nix search against the flake's locked nixpkgs; if the attribute doesn't exist under that name, search for the right one, e.g. within an antigravity package set — and if nothing exists, STOP and report rather than inventing). Add it gated the same way as the existing antigravity package (extend to lib.optionals ... [ pkgs.antigravity pkgs.antigravity-cli ] or parallel lib.optional — match idiom). Verify: nix flake check; eval classic-laddie toplevel + the CI-built home configurations. One-sentence PR. NOTE: another agent may be concurrently editing home/dev.nix (delta/difftastic work) — keep your diff minimal to reduce conflict surface; if you hit a push race, rebase and retry.
